search_query: Dynamo doesn't support tracing through torch.autograd.grad. I use it for computing per-sample gradients. How do I make this work with torch.compile?

results.title: [dynamo] torch.randint_like on DTensor does not work with compile · Issue #156649 · pytorch/pytorc
Compiled autograd does not support reading attribute from autograd context if the attribute is create
